prestazioni: Engine: Full built Beta II 2.7L V6 (G6BA) with forged internals including Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings. Stock crankshaft balanced and polished by JE Pistons. Upgraded valvetrain with Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves, Supertech dual valve springs, and titanium retainers. Ported and polished cylinder heads by Hyundai Performance Specialist (HPS) with oversized 34mm intake valves and 30mm exhaust valves.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 0.82 A/R compressor housing) with TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate. Custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Full-Race Motorsports with equal-length runners and V-band flanges. TurboSmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve. Custom intercooler piping with 3-inch aluminum charge pipes and Vibrant Performance silicone couplers. Front-mount intercooler: GReddy Type-RS 550 core with 2.5-inch inlet/outlet.

Fuel & Ignition: Full return-style fuel system with Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, Aeromotive 340 Stealth fuel pump, and Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator. Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min) with custom fuel rail. AEM 340LPH high-flow fuel pump controller. Ignition upgrade with NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (LFR6AIX-11), MSD 8.5mm super conductor spark plug wires, and AEM CDI ignition system. ECU: Haltech Elite 2500 standalone with custom dyno-tuned map for 93 octane pump gas (targeting 350whp/320wtq).
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Rocket Bunny V1 Tiburon kit (fiberglass fenders, front bumper, rear bumper, and side skirts) with custom carbon fiber overfenders. Custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on roof and hood. Custom front splitter: Seibon Carbon fiber lip with adjustable canards. Rear diffuser: VIS Racing carbon fiber diffuser with integrated dual 3.5-inch exhaust outlets.

Suspension & Wheels: KW Variant 3 coilovers with adjustable rebound, compression, and ride height (1.5-inch drop from stock). Cusco front strut bar and rear upper strut bar. Wheel setup: Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x10.5 +30 rear with Toyo R888R 245/40/18 front and 275/35/18 rear tires. Custom rear subframe reinforcement by Cusco with polyurethane bushings.

Aero & Lighting: Custom carbon fiber GT-style wing by Seibon (30-inch width, 6-inch height, adjustable angle). Custom LED taillight conversion by Diode Dynamics with sequential turn signals. Front headlight conversion: Spec-D Tuning HID projector headlights with Morimoto 35W HID bulbs (5500K). Custom carbon fiber hood with functional vents and hidden hood pins by Seibon. Rear window louvers: Custom carbon fiber louvers by Seibon.
